message.content: ```plantuml @startuml title PB-749 UC4 - Update a Banner on System Management skinparam backgroundColor white skinparam shadowing false skinparam sequence { ArrowColor #000000 LifeLineBorderColor #666666 LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF ParticipantBorderColor #666666 ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F7 BoxBorderColor #999999 BoxBackgroundColor #E6E6E6 GroupBorderColor #000000 GroupBackgroundColor #FFFFFF NoteBorderColor #666666 NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4 } note top Abstract: This use case will be responsible to update an existing banner on Next. This endpoint is not responsible for deleting a record. To do this, it must use the use case 5 - Delete a Banner on System Management. However, in this use case, SM may enable or disable Banner. end note actor "System Management" as SM box "Next Platform" #E6E6E6 participant "Core Next" as CN database "Next Database" as DB end box participant "Core Bradesco" as CB SM -> CN : 1 PUT /v1/notification/banner/{bannerID} note right of CN System Management will call this new endpoint passing all the fields necessary to update an existing Banner. The fields are: 1. BANNER_ID 2. BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE_ID 3. TEMPLATE_HEADER 4. TEMPLATE_BODY 5. ENABLE_IND end note CN -> DB : 2 check if this Banner exists on BANNER table note right of CN Core Next will check if this Banner exists on BANNER table end note DB --> CN : 3 response alt [if the Banner exists] CN -> DB : 4 check if exists an enabled Banner associated with that BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE received on requisition on BANNER table note right of CN #F9A825 Note to developers Core Next will check if exists any Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE on BANNER table. We can only have one enabled Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE. For this rule, we should disregard the records that are with DELETE_FLG enabled and the Card itself. end note DB --> CN : 5 response alt [if exists an enabled Banner associated with that BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE] CN --> SM : 6 error note left of SM #F8BBD0 HTTP code: 422 end note note right of CN If exists any Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE passed by App, we will throw back an error to App side. end note else [if don't exists an enabled Banner associated with that BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE] note right of CN If the defensive checks pass, then we will update the register on BANNER table. end note CN -> DB : 7 update the register on BANNER table DB --> CN : 8 success CN --> SM : 9 success note left of SM #B3E5FC HTTP code: 200 end note end else [if the Banner don't exists] CN --> SM : 10 error note left of SM #F8BBD0 If the Banner don't exists on BANNER table, then we will throw back an error to SM. HTTP code: 404 end note end @enduml ```
